Dipteryx alata, commonly referred to as Dupatya, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The bioactive constituents of Dupatya include coumarins, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Dupatya include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
